# Rorschach-Inkblot Generator: A Math Explainer
This project is a functional demonstration of how mathematical concepts like matrix transformations and Gaussian noise can be used to generate symmetrical, organic shapes similar to Rorschach inkblots.

## Main Concepts:
- Axial Symmetry: Using reflection matrices.
- Procedural Generation: Creating shapes from random distributions.
- Image Processing: Applying filters to simulate ink spread.
